title: solanum stramoniifolium var. stramoniifolium
intro: Solanum stramoniifolium var. stramoniifolium, also known as the strawberry jasmine or strawberry bush, is a plant species belonging to the Solanaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solanum stramoniifolium var. stramoniifolium include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to produce a tea, or by using its leaves in a topical ointment to treat skin issues.
